name: Golf VX Corp
about: Golf VX Corp specializes in advanced indoor golf simulators for both home and commercial use. Their systems combine cutting-edge technology, including zero-lag performance, moving swing plates, and high-speed sensors, to deliver a realistic golfing experience. The company offers two primary simulator models: the T2 for immersive home or business use and the FA, a compact unit designed for training and space-constrained environments. Additionally, they provide franchise opportunities for entrepreneurs looking to launch commercial golf venues with integrated food, beverage, and event capabilities. Pricing for home systems ranges from $50,000 to $70,000, fully installed, with packages including a gaming PC, multi-surface mats, and access to over 380 virtual courses in 4K.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading camera sensors provide precise ball and club tracking
Dynamic swing plate and multiple lie mats replicate real-course conditions
Auto-tee and touch controls enable fast-paced, seamless gameplay
Access to over 380 4K virtual golf courses worldwide
Turnkey solutions with professional installation and support

food_and_drink.notes: On-site micro-market for food and beverage options
Offered at full-service Lounge and Lab franchise locations

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end system with industry-leading camera sensors, dynamic swing plate, and multi-surface hitting mats
Compact training simulator with stats and video tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The simulator packages include multi-surface hitting mats that replicate fairway, rough, and bunker conditions, allowing you to use your own clubs. The systems are designed to work with standard golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Lounges and Lab franchise locations feature a micro-market for food and beverage options. For commercial facilities, outside food and drinks may not be permitted, but you can purchase items on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Play time varies depending on the number of players and pace of play. With auto-tee systems and touch controls, gameplay is fast-paced, allowing golfers to complete 18 holes efficiently.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf VX venues are designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels and ages. The facilities can be operated with minimal staff and offer a welcoming environment for families and juniors.
